content.speakerText: Please be at Gate 5 10 minutes before departure. Don’t forget your belongings!
content.speakerTextCn: 请在发车前10分钟到达5号门，别忘了随身物品！

options.text: Can I bring my pet on board?

content.explanation: 正确答案'I’ll be there right away.'是对提醒的直接回应，表示会按时到达，符合语境。其他选项分别询问宠物、票价和洗手间，与提醒内容无关，属于干扰项。

content.speakerText: The driver will announce stops. If you need help, press the call button.
content.speakerTextCn: 司机将播报站点，如有需要请按呼叫按钮。

options.text: I’ll press the button if I need help.
Can I get off at the next stop?
Do you have Wi-Fi on board?
What time does the bus leave?

content.explanation: 正确答案'I’ll press the button if I need help.'准确回应了关于呼叫按钮的提示，表达确认。其他选项询问下车、Wi-Fi或发车时间，偏离了当前提醒的核心内容。

content.speakerText: Your flight is boarding soon. Please have your boarding pass ready and follow the signs to Gate 7.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的航班即将登机，请准备好登机牌并跟随指示前往7号登机口。

options.text: I’ll make sure to have it ready.
Is there a luggage storage nearby?

content.explanation: 正确答案'I’ll make sure to have it ready.'是对提醒的积极回应，体现配合态度。其他选项涉及改座、行李寄存和飞行时长，属于无关问题，不符合道别与提醒场景的回应逻辑。

content.template: Please be at Gate 5 ___ minutes before departure.
content.hint: 提醒中提到的提前到达时间
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频词汇（时间表达）

content.hint: 工作人员提醒不要忘记的随身物品
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频词汇（随身物品）

content.template: If you need help, ___ the call button.
content.hint: 请求帮助时的标准动作

content.speakerText: Please be at Gate 5 10 minutes before departure. Don’t forget your belongings!
content.speakerTextCn: 请在发车前10分钟到达5号门，别忘了随身物品！
expectedAnswers: Will there be an announcement? I want to make sure I don’t miss it.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了提醒内容
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如 'belongings', 'departure', 'announcement'

content.speakerText: The driver will announce stops. If you need help, press the call button.
content.speakerTextCn: 司机将播报站点，如有需要请按呼叫按钮。
expectedAnswers: Got it, I’ll press the button.
What if I miss my stop? Should I ask the driver?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否确认或询问了下车方式
语言准确性：动词和短语使用是否正确（如 press the button）
表达自然度：是否自然衔接道别或进一步确认
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'call button', 'stops', 'miss my stop'

content.speakerText: The train is about to leave. Please make sure your ticket is ready and stay behind the yellow line.
content.speakerTextCn: 列车即将发车，请确保您的车票准备好，并站在黄线后。
expectedAnswers: Thanks for the warning! I’ll stay behind the line.
Will there be a reminder before departure?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了安全提醒和准备要求
语言准确性：是否正确使用 'ticket', 'yellow line', 'departure' 等关键词
表达自然度：是否使用符合语境的口语表达
关键词覆盖：是否涵盖核心提示信息
